subject: feat(theme): migrate from Tailwind 3 to Tailwind 4 + DaisyUI 5 (WIP)
body:
Switch UI chrome from hand-rolled semantic tokens to DaisyUI nord/night
themes. This replaces the custom color system (violet primary, deep
indigo dark mode) with DaisyUI's built-in component tokens, eliminating
~170 dark: class pairs across 30 files.

Infrastructure: TW4 CSS-first config, @tailwindcss/vite plugin, removed
postcss.config.js + tailwind.config.js. Dual-layer theming: data-theme
(DaisyUI) + .dark class (Tailwind) synced in useDarkMode.js and the
flash-prevention inline script. Remaining tab/layout components still
in progress.

Tags: theme, daisyui, tailwind, infrastructure, dark-mode
Complexity: 5
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: high
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: major
